rationale: The proposed change modifies a property tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §253.038 governs campaign finance restrictions on political contributions used for real property purchases. The two provisions address unrelated subject matter and do not interact.
quote: A candidate or officeholder or a specific-purpose committee for supporting, opposing, or assisting the candidate or officeholder may not knowingly make or authorize a payment from a political contribution to purchase real property or to pay the interest on or principal of a note for the purchase of real property.
_note: No conflict; the cited election code provision is unrelated to the proposed property tax exemption change.
